name: com.network-example.kernel
description: Thin Unity P/Invoke wrapper for the network-example native kernel C ABI.

samples.description: Minimal MonoBehaviour that starts listen-server mode, advances the kernel, submits input, and reads render states.
Client-mode MonoBehaviour for connecting Unity to a command-line dedicated server.
Log-only MonoBehaviour for triggering LAN discovery from a UI Button and printing direct-IP connect endpoints.
Listen-host MonoBehaviour that runs the pure runtime SDK plus native GameServer bridge and exposes render states as data.
